creator: mickael.maillot@gmail.com
text:
I need more information to debug the problem like config.log and all output
during make command.
can you try the 13.0 update in PR ports/185466 ?


2013/12/22 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>

> Maintainer of multimedia/xbmc,
>

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
